Only open when the community center is open:
Monday/Wednesday/Friday 4-9 p.m.
Tuesday & Thursday 9 a.m - 2:30 p.m. 
However, the other toilet on the outside of the building is open more reliably.
Officially open whenever the park is: 6am-10pm daily. However, they aren't 100% reliably unlocked at the start of every day.
